events.name: Portland Trail Blazers at Washington Wizards

headlines.description: — Alex Sarr had 29 points, 12 rebounds and six blocked shots, and the Washington Wizards snapped a nine-game losing streak with a 115-111 victory over the Portland Trail Blazers on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sarr's big night helps the Wizards snap a 9-game skid with a 115-111 win over Portland

events.name: Sacramento Kings at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Sacramento Kings vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Sacramento Kings vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Sacramento Kings vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights) 2026/01/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 28 points and the New York Knicks dominated the fourth quarter to beat the Sacramento Kings 103-87 on Tuesday night for their third straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson, Knicks use a big fourth quarter to beat the Kings 103-87 for their 3rd straight win

highlights.headline: Milwaukee Bucks vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Milwaukee Bucks vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Milwaukee Bucks vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Paul George scored 32 points, Joel Embiid had 18 of his 29 points in the first quarter and the Philadelphia 76ers rolled to a 139-122 victory over the short-handed Milwaukee Bucks on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: George scores 32 and Embiid has 29 to lead 76ers past short-handed Bucks 139-122

events.name: New Orleans Pelicans at Oklahoma City Thunder

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New Orleans Pelicans vs. Oklahoma City Thunder: Game Highlights) 2026/01/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 29 points and the short-handed Oklahoma City Thunder beat the New Orleans Pelicans 104-95 on Tuesday night to avoid their first three-game skid of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 29 and NBA-best Thunder beat Pelicans 104-95 to stop 2-game skid

highlights.description: Detroit Pistons vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Detroit Pistons vs. Denver Nuggets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tobias Harris scored 22 points, including two free throws with 2 seconds left, and the Detroit Pistons held off a late Denver rally to beat the travel-weary Nuggets 109-107 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tobias Harris and Cade Cunningham score 22 each as Pistons hold off Nuggets 109-107

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brooklyn Nets vs. Phoenix Suns: Game Highlights) 2026/01/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Mark Williams scored 27 points, Dillon Brooks had 26 and the short-handed Suns beat the Brooklyn Nets 106-102 on Tuesday night in a game that featured a scuffle late in the fourth quarter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suns beat Nets 106-102 after teams scuffle late in fourth quarter

highlights.headline: LA Clippers vs. Utah Jazz: Game Highlights
highlights.description: LA Clippers vs. Utah Jazz: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LA Clippers vs. Utah Jazz: Game Highlights) 2026/01/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 21 points, James Harden had 16 points and 10 assists, and the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 115-103 on Tuesday night for their ninth win in 10 games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Clippers beat the Jazz 115-103 behind Leonard's 25th straight game with more than 20 points
